caption: A person wearing a pink t-shirt and a white baseball cap stands in a retail clothing store, looking at and touching black jackets hanging on a rack. In the background, various apparel is visible, including blue shirts, hats, and signs with the "ONEILL" logo. The setting is a surf or skate shop with clothing organized on walls and shelves. As the scene transitions, the view shifts to a different location featuring a wooden railing and a blue banner that reads "STATION" and "OFFICIAL SPONSORS TOMMY TANT JUNIOR PRO" alongside a "VANS" logo. A person wearing a red and white outfit is partially visible behind the railing. The final frame changes abruptly to a black background filled with sparkling purple and white light effects and a green circular graphic containing stylized text.
